title: PolicyCondition
description: A rule-evaluation expression in one of four declared languages: jsonlogic, cel, rego, or cedar. Embedded inside a Rule.

language.description: The expression language: jsonlogic (embeddable JSON rules), cel (Common Expression Language), rego (OPA Rego), or cedar (AWS Cedar).

expr.description: The condition expression. Structure is defined by the `language` value.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes explaining the condition logic.
